name: Arabian Shield Cooperative Insurance Company
summary: Arabian Shield Cooperative Insurance Company offers various insurance products to companies and individuals in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It offers medical, motor, property, engineering, marine, liability, accident, casualty, protection and saving, travel, and medical malpractice insurance, as well as reinsurance products. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Riyadh, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
